name: CuraLog
description: Full medication management platform for caregivers and care teams. Multi-patient support, refill tracking, provider lookup, secure messaging, and role-based access.

name: Finance Tracker
description: Personal finance dashboard for tracking credit cards, subscriptions, and bills. Includes utilization alerts, debt payoff calculator, and shared payment splits.

name: Client Portal
description: Private project delivery and file-sharing portal for DataPrimeTech clients. Milestone tracking, feedback threads, and secure document handoff.

name: Field Ops Tracker
description: Job scheduling and crew management tool for small field-service businesses. Work orders, photo logs, client sign-off, and invoice generation.
